use_cases: Animated hero section headlines that reveal text character by character
Attention-grabbing product titles or feature announcements
Engaging intro text for video content or presentations
Staggered text reveals for storytelling and narrative flow
Replayable animations for interactive product demonstrations
ai_summary: A character-by-character text reveal animation component with staggered timing. Each letter animates upward with opacity fade using CSS keyframes, creating an engaging headline effect. Includes a replay button to reset and replay the animation. Perfect for hero sections, product reveals, and attention-grabbing text presentations across SaaS, media, and e-commerce platforms.
